changelog: Feature: Group Rack Layout by Location with dynamic headers
Feature: Location-based filtering in Rack Layout
Feature: Initial release of Data Center Audit System (DC-Check)
Feature: Core Dashboard and Analytics module
Feature: Full Check-in and Checklist functionalities
Feature: Site Management with interactive Map Selector for Indonesia
Feature: Rack Management and Device Inventory
Feature: Container deployment architecture with Docker/Podman support
Feature: Over-The-Air (OTA) System Update functionality via Git
Feature: Auto-refresh all pages after Add/Edit/Delete operations (CRUD)
Feature: Form data preservation on input error (e.g. rack collision)
Feature: Audit Log — Full coverage for Device, Category, Brand, Location, Rack, VLAN, Port, User, Site, and Auth activities
Feature: About page with CODEX ASCII Logo and Team Operational Support SJA credits
Fix: Resolve dashboard counter formatting bug (string concatenation digit issue)
Fix: Robust database backup detection in update.ps1 using Docker filters
Fix: Permit creation of 'superadmin' role in user management (Role validation fix)
